2603.17378.title: Efficient Exploration at Scale
2603.17378.paper_summary: We develop an online learning algorithm that dramatically improves the data efficiency of reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). Our algorithm incrementally updates reward and language models as choice data is received. The reward model is fit to the choice data, while the language model is updated by a variation of reinforce, with reinforcement signals provided by the reward model. Several features enable the efficiency gains: a small affirmative nudge added to each reinforcement signal, an epistemic neural network that models reward uncertainty, and information-directed exploration. With Gemma large language models (LLMs), our algorithm matches the performance of offline RLHF trained on 200K labels using fewer than 20K labels, representing more than a 10x gain in data efficiency. Extrapolating from our results, we expect our algorithm trained on 1M labels to match offline RLHF trained on 1B labels. This represents a 1,000x gain. To our knowledge, these are the first results to demonstrate that such large improvements are possible.
2603.17378.paper_summary_zh: 我們開發了一種在線學習算法，顯著提高了來自人類反饋的強化學習（RLHF）的數據效率。<lb/>我們的算法在接收到選擇數據時，逐步更新獎勵模型和語言模型。<lb/>獎勵模型是根據選擇數據進行擬合，而語言模型則通過一種變體的增強進行更新，增強信號由獎勵模型提供。<lb/>幾個特徵使得效率提升成為可能：對每個增強信號添加的小幅肯定推動、一個建模獎勵不確定性的認知神經網絡，以及信息導向的探索。<lb/>使用Gemma大型語言模型（LLMs），我們的算法在使用少於20K標籤的情況下，達到了在200K標籤上訓練的離線RLHF的性能，這代表著超過10倍的數據效率提升。<lb/>根據我們的結果推斷，我們預期在1M標籤上訓練的算法將匹配在1B標籤上訓練的離線RLHF。<lb/>這代表著1,000倍的增益。<lb/>據我們所知，這些是首次證明如此大幅度提升是可能的結果。
2603.17378.author: Seyed Mohammad Asghari et.al.
2603.17378.authors: Seyed Mohammad Asghari, Chris Chute, Vikranth Dwaracherla, Xiuyuan Lu, Mehdi Jafarnia, Victor Minden, Zheng Wen, Benjamin Van Roy
